summary: Verified lane guidance overlay and blue chevron user icon implementation. All key features working: blue gradient chevron (nav-chevron-fill with #4285F4/#1A73E8), route calculation with highway shields/exit signs/speed limit signs, Navigation HUD with distance/instruction/turn icon, and Settings truck profile edit modal. Lane guidance panel implemented correctly but only visible within 2 miles of maneuver with lane data.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: User icon is blue gradient chevron - NavigationView.tsx lines 1286-1305 with SVG using linearGradient id='nav-chevron-fill' from #4285F4 to #1A73E8, white stroke, and drop shadow filter
VERIFIED: LaneData interface in NavigationHUD.tsx lines 6-9 has correct type: { direction: string; matches: string[] }
VERIFIED: Lane guidance panel shows when distVal <= 2.0 miles (line 20 in NavigationHUD.tsx)
VERIFIED: Lane guidance panel has data-testid='lane-guidance-panel' at line 89
VERIFIED: Lane guidance label has data-testid='lane-guidance-label' at line 95
VERIFIED: Route overlay signs render on signPane (z-index 630) above routePane (z-index 420)
VERIFIED: Highway shields placed - console shows '[Shields] Placed 25 highway shield markers on route'
VERIFIED: Exit signs placed - console shows '[Signs] Placed 4 exit signs on route'
VERIFIED: Speed limit signs placed - console shows '[Signs] Placed 4 speed limit signs on route'
VERIFIED: Settings truck profile edit modal works - opens with input field, Cancel and Save buttons functional

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Lane guidance overlay and blue chevron user icon verified. User icon uses SVG with linearGradient (nav-chevron-fill) from #4285F4 to #1A73E8. Lane guidance panel only appears when: (1) isDriving is true, (2) nextInstruction.lanes exists with items, (3) distance to maneuver <= 2 miles. To test lane data visibility, need a route with highway interchanges that have lane guidance data from HERE API. Route from Council Bluffs to Denver shows 25 highway shields, 4 exit signs, 4 speed limit signs.

blue_chevron_user_icon.details: User marker found with nav-chevron-fill gradient (#4285F4 to #1A73E8), white stroke, and glow filter. Console confirmed: 'PASS: Blue gradient chevron (nav-chevron-fill) present', 'PASS: Blue gradient colors present'

route_calculation.details: Route to Denver calculated: 545.9 mi, 7h 43m. Console shows route processing with 3950 coordinates

navigation_hud.details: HUD displays at top with '0.2 MI' distance, 'HEAD TOWARD S 8TH ST ON W BROADWAY. GO FOR 1312 FT.' instruction, and arrow up turn icon

highway_shields.details: 25 highway shield markers placed on route (I-80, I-29, US-192 visible in screenshots)

exit_signs.details: 4 exit signs placed on route (EXIT 51 visible)

speed_limit_signs.details: 4 speed limit signs placed on route (Speed Limit 35 visible)

lane_guidance_panel.details: Lane guidance panel implemented with data-testid='lane-guidance-panel', shows within 2 miles of maneuver. Not visible in test because first maneuver at 0.2mi doesn't have lane data from HERE API

lanedata_type.details: LaneData interface correctly defined at lines 6-9: { direction: string; matches: string[] }

route_overlay_z_ordering.details: Signs render ON TOP of route line - routePane z-420, signPane z-630

settings_truck_profile_edit.details: Edit modal opens with input field (13.5 feet), CANCEL and SAVE buttons work correctly

code_verification.user_icon_svg: NavigationView.tsx lines 1286-1305: SVG with linearGradient id='nav-chevron-fill' from #4285F4 to #1A73E8, polygon with white stroke, drop shadow filter
code_verification.lane_data_interface: NavigationHUD.tsx lines 6-9: interface LaneData { direction: string; matches: string[]; }
code_verification.lane_panel_visibility: NavigationHUD.tsx line 20: showLanes = nextInstruction.lanes && nextInstruction.lanes.length > 0 && distVal <= 2.0
code_verification.vehicle_pointer_css: index.css lines 39-42: .vehicle-pointer with transform: rotate(var(--vehicle-rotation, 0deg)) and transition: none
